A0692/26 NOTAMN 
Q) VVHM/QAFXX/IV/NBO/E/000/999/1054N10938E030
A) VVHM B) 2604071300 C) 2604101530 
D) DAILY 1300-1530
E) DUE TO AEROSPACE FLIGHT ACTIVITY FM CHINA, THE FLIGHT 
SAFETY OF THE ACFT IN THE FLW AREA MAY BE AFFECTED:
102800N1092300E - 112200N1093100E - 111900N1095300E - 
102500N1094600E, POINTS CONNECTION RANGE
VERTICAL ALTITUDE: SFC-UNL
1. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS MENTIONED BELOW ARE 
NOT USED:
- M771: SUDUN - DAMVO - DOXAR
- N500: AGSIS - DAMVO - MIMUX
- M765: SAMAP - MAPNO
2. DRG THIS ACTIVITY, ATS RTE SEGMENTS MENTIONED BELOW SHALL 
BE OPERATED AS FLW:
- ACFT ON M771: M771 - DAGAG - AGSIS - CRA - NITOM - M771
- ACFT ON N892 - N500 TO VVTS: N892 - MESOX - Q15 - CRA - W15
- ACFT ON N500 TO VVTS AND VICE VERSA: N500 - PANDI - AGSAM - 
OSIXA - DAGAG - ELSAS - M768
- OVERFLIGHT ACFT ON N500 AND VICE VERSA: N500 - PANDI - 
AGSAM - OSIXA - DAGAG - M768 - TSH
- OVERFLIGHT ACFT ON M765 AND VICE VERSA: M765 - IGARI - 
DAGAG - OSIXA - ALDAS - M765 - PANDI
- FL310, FL350, FL390 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE M771
- FL320, FL360, FL400 WILL BE APPLIED TO ACFT ON ATS RTE L642
RMKS:
- ALL ACFT SHALL AVOID THE AFFECTED AREA OR SUBJ TO ATC CLEARANCES
- THE AEROSPACE FLIGHT ACTIVITY CONDUCTED BY CHINA DIRECTLY 
AFFECTS FLIGHT OPERATIONS WI HO CHI MINH FIR. THE CHINA 
PARTY IS REQUIRED TO CONTINUE TO COORDINATE WITH THE 
COMPETENT AUTHORITIES OF VIETNAM IN LINE WITH THE PROCEDURES 
SET OUT IN ANNEX 11 AND AGREED PROCEDURES OF THE REGION
- THIS NOTAM IS ISSUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH ICAO REQUIREMENTS 
FOR THE SAFETY OF ACFT OPERATIONS WI HO CHI MINH FIR.
F) SFC G) UNL
